reviews.comment:
La atencion del personal de primera fui a asegurar el auto una sola persona atendiendo
UNA VERGUENZA la empleada hace lo que puede saca fotos llena formularios atiende personas que no entienden media hora por persona y ademas te dan turno
ACA hay que revisar esto

(Translated by Google)
The staff was first-rate. I went to secure my car, only one person was there.
A DISGRACE. The employee does what she can, takes photos, fills out forms, helps people who don't understand, and spends half an hour per person, plus they give you an appointment.
This needs to be checked HERE.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTaVpXcjB3RRAB
